input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.9.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.9.1
            TITLE: every part may be classified as made or bought.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.9.1: Every part may be classified as Made or Bought.
S.3.9.1 Every part may be classified as Made or Bought.   
Refer to the Formula SAE Cost Event Supplement for additional information

final_answer: rule S.3.9.1: Every part may be classified as Made or Bought. S.3.9.1 Every part may be classified as Made or Bought. Refer to the Formula SAE Cost Event Supplement for additional information
